interface: A command-line ward registry `wardex`. Subcommands: add <text> [--tag X ...], list [--tag X] [--search Q] [--deep] [--raw] [--json], show <sigil>, edit <sigil> <text>, rm <pos>, tag <sigil> <tag>, untag <sigil> <tag>, export <file>, import <file>, history <sigil>. Persist to a file. This project has established HOUSE CONVENTIONS for id format, persistence format, addressing, provenance, error protocol, tag normalization, search scoping, and audit journaling — follow them. (You will receive review feedback if your implementation violates a house convention.)

checks.name: ward_add_list
checks.symptom: Basic add then list doesn't show the ward text I added.

checks.name: ward_json_mode
checks.symptom: I want a machine-readable JSON listing I can pipe into scripts.

checks.name: ward_tag_filter
checks.symptom: Filtering the list by a tag doesn't narrow it to the tagged wards.
